title: lichen-kiss: core::error::Error impl requires Rust 1.81+
description:
files: rust/lichen-kiss/src/framing.rs:105, rust/lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs:64

Both KissError and BridgeError use:
```rust
impl core::error::Error for KissError {}
impl core::error::Error for BridgeError { ... }
```

core::error::Error was stabilized in Rust 1.81.0. Projects using older toolchains or targeting no_std without this feature will fail to build.

Same issue as project-LICHEN-nhwc (senml module).

Impact: Build failure on Rust < 1.81.0 toolchains.

Fix: Either document MSRV as 1.81+, or use conditional compilation with #[cfg(feature = "std")] std::error::Error fallback.
close_reason: Added rust-version=1.81.0 to workspace; fixed CBOR skip_one_depth for info=24 in senml; added pcs/a_flag to DodagConfig+parse+test in rpl; addressed review findings in kiss/schnorr/link
